CustomObject.description: Published by the order management system when an order is fulfilled. Consumed by OrderFulfilmentEventHandler to accrue loyalty points.
CustomObject.label: Order Fulfilment Event

fields.description: External order identifier. Used as idempotency key for TJ referenceId.
fields.label: Order ID

fields.description: SFDC Contact Id of the purchasing member.
fields.label: Contact ID

fields.description: Total fulfilled order value in the program currency.
fields.label: Order Amount

fields.description: JSON-serialised array of CartLineItem DTOs for exclusion-rule processing.
fields.label: Cart Lines JSON
